title: mitracarpus bahorucanus
intro: Mitracarpus bahorucanus, also known as 'Mara' or 'Jamaica root', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Mitracarpus bahorucanus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
